data.content: Plan review rejected. The proposed changes target table header columns in src/components/beat-columns.tsx, but the requirement language matches the focused-row overview grid in src/components/beat-table-summary.tsx, which currently renders Description, Notes, and Handoff Capsules. Revise the plan to add an Acceptance criteria summary column there as the second overview column, update the render guard so acceptance-only rows still show the overview, adjust the grid layout from 3 to 4 columns, and validate label/order/content/responsive behavior in the overview rather than table headers.
